scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: eslint backend/src frontend/src && cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd backend && npm run test && cd ../frontend && npm run test
scripts.security:audit: cd backend && npm audit && cd ../frontend && npm audit
scripts.security:outdated: cd backend && npm outdated && cd ../frontend && npm outdated
